tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: Stop beating around the bush and just tell me what happened. Don't be such a _______.
I've been working like a _______ all week and I still haven't finished the project.
She let the _______ out of the bag and told everyone about the surprise party.
That new student is a real dark _______. Nobody expected him to win the competition.
He's always borrowing money and never paying it back. He's a real _______.
When the teacher walked in, the noisy class went quiet — you could have heard a _______ drop.
